title: Gov. Pritzker Announces New $820M Sustainable Aviation Fuel Investment in Southwest Illinois
content: â€‹ Governor JB Pritzker, Avina Clean Hydrogen, and the Illinois Department of Commerce and Economic Opportunity (DCEO) today announced the selection of Southwest Illinois as the location for Avina Clean Hydrogen's $820 million investment for a sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) project. The investment will enable Avina Clean Hydrogen Inc., a pioneer in the clean fuels sector, to develop its facility to produce SAF, helping meet Illinois' clean energy goals and supporting the state's growing clean energy economy.
author: Analysts Account
